title: pyrenaria microcarpa var. tenuifolia
intro: Pyrenaria microcarpa var. tenuifolia, also known as a type of flowering plant in the Theaceae family, is a variant of the Pyrenaria microcarpa species. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Pyrenaria microcarpa var. tenuifolia include reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing, as well as supporting the immune system and cardiovascular health. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being incorporated into various traditional Chinese medicine formulas.
